data_source.description: Optional alternate extraction strategy. When set, 'selector' is not required and the profile is consumed by the toolbox extension only (the server cannot scrape it). 'next_data' reads __NEXT_DATA__ from a Next.js page and walks a JSON path defined in the 'next_data' object.

domain.description: Primary domain without www (e.g., 'amazon.com'). Used by the browser extension for quick matching.

filters.description: Post-extraction filters applied to the extracted text.

exclude.description: Regex patterns — matching results are removed.

include.description: Regex patterns — only matching results are kept. Null means keep all.

name.description: Human-readable name for this profile (e.g., 'Amazon Search Results')

name_cleanup.description: Optional regex strips applied to the extracted name. Works for both DOM-based and next_data profiles.

next_data.description: Configuration for data_source='next_data'. Required when data_source='next_data'.

fields.description: Map of output field name to a dot path inside each item. 'name' is required; 'price', 'sale_price', 'currency', 'image' are optional. Array indexing is supported as 'medias[0].url'.

items_path.description: Dot path inside __NEXT_DATA__ pointing to the array of items (e.g. 'props.initialState.CatalogItems.result.items'). Can also be an array of paths for multi-source merging.

name_cleanup.description: Optional regex strips applied to the extracted name before filtering/dedup.

price_cleanup.description: Optional regex strips applied to the extracted price string.

selector.description: CSS selector targeting game/product name elements on the page. Required for DOM-based scraping; not required when 'data_source' is set.

threshold.description: Similarity threshold for matching extracted names to the BGM database (0-1). Lower values are more permissive.

url_pattern.description: Regex pattern matched against the full URL. Used by the website for precise matching. First match wins — put specific patterns before generic ones.

description: Community-maintained board game site extraction profiles for BGM Toolbox and BoardGameMatcher.com
title: BGM Site Profiles
